content.json:
# Azure Arc PoC Infrastructure Monitoring

Scoped to the current **Log Analytics workspace**. Uses **OpenTelemetry (InsightsMetrics)** for performance data.

| Section | Time Range |
|---|---|
| Host Availability | Last 1 day |
| CPU / Memory / Disk Performance | Last 24 hours |
| CPU / Memory Anomalies | Last 3 days |
| Disk Anomalies & Forecast | Last 30 days |
| Services & Containers | Last 24 hours |

content.query:
Heartbeat
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(1d)
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, ResourceType, OSType
| summarize LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by Computer, ResourceType, OSType
| extend Status = iff(LastSeen > ago(5m), 'Up', 'Down')
| extend Source = case(
    ResourceType == 'machines', 'Azure Arc',
    ResourceType == 'virtualMachines', 'Azure VM',
    'Unknown'
  )
| extend StatusCode = iff(Status == 'Up', 1, 0)
| project Computer, Status, StatusCode, Source, OSType, LastSeen
| order by StatusCode asc, Source asc, Computer asc
content.title: Host Availability (Heartbeat – All Sources)

content.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Namespace, Name, Val
| where Namespace == 'Processor' and Name == 'UtilizationPercentage'
| summarize AvgCPU = avg(Val) by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m), Computer
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: CPU Utilization (15-minute avg, last 24h)

content.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Namespace, Name, Val
| where Namespace == 'Memory' and Name == 'AvailableMB'
| summarize AvgAvailMB = avg(Val) by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m), Computer
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Available Memory MB (15-minute avg, last 24h)

content.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Namespace, Name, Val
| where Namespace == 'Processor' and Name == 'UtilizationPercentage'
| summarize Score = avg(Val) by Computer
| where Score > 1
| top 10 by Score desc
| project Computer, AvgCPUPct = round(Score, 2)
content.title: Top 10 Noisy Hosts – CPU (last 24h)

content.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Namespace, Name, Val
| where Namespace == 'Memory' and Name == 'AvailableMB'
| summarize Score = avg(Val) by Computer
| top 10 by Score asc
| project Computer, AvgAvailMB = round(Score, 2)
| order by AvgAvailMB asc
content.title: Top 10 Noisy Hosts – RAM Lowest Available (last 24h)

content.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Namespace, Name, Val, Tags
| where Namespace == 'LogicalDisk' and Name == 'FreeSpacePercentage'
| extend Disk = tostring(parse_json(Tags)['vm.azm.ms/mountId'])
| where Disk !startswith '/snap/' and Disk !startswith '/run/' and Disk !startswith '/sys/' and Disk !startswith '/dev/'
| summarize Score = avg(Val) by Computer, Disk
| top 10 by Score asc
| project Computer, Disk, AvgFreeSpacePct = round(Score, 2)
| order by AvgFreeSpacePct asc
content.title: Top 10 Noisy Hosts – Disk Lowest Free Space (last 24h)

content.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(1d)
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Namespace, Name, Val, Tags
| where Namespace == 'LogicalDisk' and Name == 'FreeSpacePercentage'
| extend Disk = tostring(parse_json(Tags)['vm.azm.ms/mountId'])
| where Disk !startswith '/snap/' and Disk !startswith '/run/' and Disk !startswith '/sys/' and Disk !startswith '/dev/'
| summarize CurrentFree = avg(Val) by Computer, Disk
| where CurrentFree < 20
| project Computer, Disk, CurrentFreePct = round(CurrentFree, 2)
| order by CurrentFreePct asc
content.title: Low Disk Space Warning – < 20% Free (last 24h)

content.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(30d)
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Namespace, Name, Val, Tags
| where Namespace == 'LogicalDisk' and Name == 'FreeSpacePercentage'
| extend Disk = tostring(parse_json(Tags)['vm.azm.ms/mountId'])
| where Disk !startswith '/snap/' and Disk !startswith '/run/' and Disk !startswith '/sys/' and Disk !startswith '/dev/'
| summarize AvgFree = avg(Val) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), Computer, Disk
| order by Computer asc, Disk asc, TimeGenerated asc
| serialize
| extend Prev = prev(AvgFree, 1)
| extend BurnRate = iff(isnull(Prev), real(0), abs(AvgFree - Prev))
| summarize CurrentFree = todouble(arg_max(TimeGenerated, AvgFree)), AvgBurn = avg(BurnRate) by Computer, Disk
| extend DaysToFull = iff(AvgBurn == real(0), real(null), CurrentFree / AvgBurn)
| where isnotnull(DaysToFull) and DaysToFull < 180
| project Computer, Disk, CurrentFreePct = round(CurrentFree, 2), DailyBurnRate = round(AvgBurn, 4), EstimatedDaysToFull = round(DaysToFull, 1)
| order by EstimatedDaysToFull asc
content.title: Disk Forecast – Estimated Days Until Full (< 180 days)

content.json:
### 🔍 CPU Anomaly Detection

This table uses **`series_decompose_anomalies()`** with a sensitivity threshold of **1.5** (medium sensitivity).

| AnomalyScore | Meaning | Recommended Action |
|---|---|---|
| **+1** | Abnormally **HIGH** CPU – unexpected spike | Investigate runaway process, scheduled job, or attack |
| **-1** | Abnormally **LOW** CPU – unexpected drop | Investigate service outage or agent failure |

> Only non-zero scores are shown. A score of **0** means the value was within the expected range and is filtered out.

content.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(3d)
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Namespace, Name, Val
| where Namespace == 'Processor' and Name == 'UtilizationPercentage'
| summarize AvgCPU = avg(Val) by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m), Computer
| make-series CPUSeries = avg(AvgCPU) on TimeGenerated step 15m by Computer
| extend anomalies = series_decompose_anomalies(CPUSeries, 1.5)
| mv-expand TimeGenerated, CPUSeries, anomalies
| where toint(anomalies) != 0
| project TimeGenerated = todatetime(TimeGenerated), Computer, AvgCPUPct = round(toreal(CPUSeries), 2), AnomalyScore = toint(anomalies)
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: CPU Anomaly Detection (last 3d, 15m bins)

content.json:
### 🔍 RAM Anomaly Detection

This table uses **`series_decompose_anomalies()`** with a sensitivity threshold of **1.5** (medium sensitivity).

| AnomalyScore | Meaning | Recommended Action |
|---|---|---|
| **+1** | Abnormally **HIGH** available memory – unexpected increase | May indicate a service stopped or workload dropped unexpectedly |
| **-1** | Abnormally **LOW** available memory – unexpected memory pressure | Investigate memory leak, large process, or sudden workload spike |

> Only non-zero scores are shown. A score of **0** means the value was within the expected range and is filtered out.

content.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(3d)
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Namespace, Name, Val
| where Namespace == 'Memory' and Name == 'AvailableMB'
| summarize AvgRAM = avg(Val) by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m), Computer
| make-series RAMSeries = avg(AvgRAM) on TimeGenerated step 15m by Computer
| extend anomalies = series_decompose_anomalies(RAMSeries, 1.5)
| mv-expand TimeGenerated, RAMSeries, anomalies
| where toint(anomalies) != 0
| project TimeGenerated = todatetime(TimeGenerated), Computer, AvgAvailMB = round(toreal(RAMSeries), 2), AnomalyScore = toint(anomalies)
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: RAM Anomaly Detection (last 3d, 15m bins)

content.json:
### 🔍 Disk Capacity Anomaly Detection

This table uses **`series_decompose_anomalies()`** with a sensitivity threshold of **1.5** (medium sensitivity).

| AnomalyScore | Meaning | Recommended Action |
|---|---|---|
| **-1** | Abnormally **LOW** free space – unexpected disk consumption | Investigate large file writes, log bloat, or runaway process |

> Only **drops** (AnomalyScore = **-1**) are shown. Unexpected increases in free space are filtered out as they do not represent a risk.

content.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(30d)
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Namespace, Name, Val, Tags
| where Namespace == 'LogicalDisk' and Name == 'FreeSpacePercentage'
| extend Disk = tostring(parse_json(Tags)['vm.azm.ms/mountId'])
| where Disk !startswith '/snap/' and Disk !startswith '/run/' and Disk !startswith '/sys/' and Disk !startswith '/dev/'
| summarize AvgFree = avg(Val) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), Computer, Disk
| make-series FreeSeries = avg(AvgFree) on TimeGenerated step 1d by Computer, Disk
| extend anomalies = series_decompose_anomalies(FreeSeries, 1.5)
| mv-expand TimeGenerated, FreeSeries, anomalies
| where toint(anomalies) == -1
| project TimeGenerated = todatetime(TimeGenerated), Computer, Disk, AvgFreePct = round(toreal(FreeSeries), 2)
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Disk Capacity Anomaly Detection (last 30d, 1d bins)

content.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, EventLog, Source, EventID, RenderedDescription
| where EventLog == 'System' and Source == 'Service Control Manager'
| where EventID in (7034, 7036)
| extend ServiceEvent = case(
    EventID == 7034, 'Service Crashed',
    EventID == 7036, 'Service State Changed',
    'Unknown'
  )
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, ServiceEvent, EventID, RenderedDescription
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100
content.title: Windows Service Events – Stopped / Crashed (last 24h)

content.query:
Syslog
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, SyslogMessage
| where SyslogMessage contains 'systemd'
| where SyslogMessage contains 'failed' or SyslogMessage contains 'stopped'
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100
content.title: Linux Service Events – Failed / Stopped (last 24h)

content.query:
ContainerInventory
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, ContainerState, Image
| summarize ContainerCount = count() by Computer, ContainerState, Image
| order by Computer asc, ContainerState asc
content.title: Container Inventory (last 24h)
